steps.title: Find circle R area
steps.content:
Circle R has radius $8$ millimeters, so use the area formula $A=\pi r^2$.
$$A=\pi(8)^2=64\pi$$

steps.title: Add the two areas
steps.content:
Circle S has area $36\pi$ square millimeters. Add the areas of the two circles.
$$64\pi+36\pi=100\pi$$
The answer is A.
